nasb.text: Come and see the works of God, Who is awesome in His deeds toward the sons of men.

esv.text: Come and see what God has done: he is awesome in his deeds toward the children of man.

cnv.text: 你們來看　神的作為， 他向世人所作的事是可畏懼的。

ccb.text: 来吧，看看上帝的作为， 祂为世人行了何等奇妙的事！

csbs.text: 你们当来，观看神的作为！ 他向世人所行的事是可畏的：
